gt_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.Score) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'
pred_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.Score) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE TRIM(T2.DisplayName) = 'csgillespie'
question: What is the average score of the posts owned by the user csgillespie?
